movie.synopsis: Head Bush (2022) Head Bush Vol 1 (2022) Head Bush revolves around Jayaraj, his friends, foes, police officers, and the politicians who changed the course of the political scenario of Bengaluru in the 1970s. The film focuses on the rise and rise of Jayaraj – from a teenager to a rowdy to a mass hero.
